subgoal: Tap the email body text area to place the cursor in the message body for typing
acceptance_criteria: Success means the email compose form stays on screen and the message body text area becomes the active input field (text caret appears in the body and/or the on-screen keyboard opens). Recipient suggestion dropdown, if present, should close or lose prominence.

llm_result.reason: Compose screen remains visible, but after-state shows recipient autocomplete/suggestion UI still present (peoplekit list row/avatar appears) and there is no clear indication that the message body gained focus (no visible caret/keyboard state change). This suggests the tap did not activate the body field and may have interacted with recipient suggestions instead.

notable_changes: No clear evidence of body field focus (caret/keyboard not indicated)

suspicious_signals: expected focus indicators (caret/keyboard) not observable in after-state

final.reason: Compose screen remains visible, but after-state shows recipient autocomplete/suggestion UI still present (peoplekit list row/avatar appears) and there is no clear indication that the message body gained focus (no visible caret/keyboard state change). This suggests the tap did not activate the body field and may have interacted with recipient suggestions instead.
